'?' : location.search;if (window.history && window.history.replaceState) {var ogU = location.pathname + window._cf_chl_opt.cOgUQuery + window._cf_chl_opt.cOgUHash;history.replaceState(null, null,"\/atom.xml?__cf_chl_rt_tk=xDEMo5FX62kOzcYxFTaT0IsrW318QnGWuTkNVwzWREA-1773624709-1.0.1.1-ZHwapcKlCT3Q2llYz8O8o2b81iMbiveluKaAV_emjXA"+ window._cf_chl_opt.cOgUHash);a.onload = function() {history.replaceState(null, null, ogU);}}document.getElementsByTagName('head')[0].appendChild(a);}());
